S02.meta: // SLIDE 02 — WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO

data.title: WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO.
blocks: · Write a Cowork task brief using a reusable seven-field template.
· Identify what is missing from a vague instruction and why the missing elements matter.
· Apply the brief template to a report task and an extraction task with worked examples.
· Use the brief as the standard against which you review the plan Cowork proposes.
data.section: WHAT THIS CHAPTER LETS YOU DO

data.section: THE HUMAN GATE FOR THIS CHAPTE

data.title: COMMON MISTAKES
blocks: Treating the brief as a longer version of a chat prompt.
Omitting exclusions because the folder is clean.
Leaving decision rules blank.
Skipping stop conditions for "low-risk" tasks.
Writing the output format as a preference rather than a requirement.

data.title: AI WAYBACK MACHINE.
blocks: Grace Hopper
Run this:
"Grace Hopper COBOL compiler"
Now make the prompt better.
